name: Alex Chen
title: Senior Software Engineer

recent_posts.text: Just wrapped up migrating our payment service to a new event-driven architecture. The latency improvements were worth every painful debugging session. Distributed systems are hard but beautiful.
Hot take: the best engineers I've worked with all have a habit of writing things down. Docs, ADRs, post-mortems — it compounds over time.

notes: Strong distributed systems background. Mentioned open to new roles in a comment 3 weeks ago.
